case_title: WILMAR FERNANDES VS. CHERYL L. ROBERTSON

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,312.82 FILED BY FERNANDES, WILMAR AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, CHERYL L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 125.00 - SERVED SEP-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, CHERYL L.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERNANDES, WILMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, CHERYL L. $3,312.82 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,487.82 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, CHERYL L.
